verses.latin_vulgate: Attulerunt igitur arcam Dei, et constituerunt eam in medio tabernaculi quod tetenderat ei David : et obtulerunt holocausta et pacifica coram Deo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיָּבִ֙יאוּ֙ אֶת־אֲר֣וֹן הָאֱלֹהִ֔ים וַיַּצִּ֣יגוּ אֹת֔וֹ בְּת֣וֹךְ הָאֹ֔הֶל אֲשֶׁ֥ר נָטָה־ל֖וֹ דָּוִ֑יד וַיַּקְרִ֛יבוּ עֹל֥וֹת וּשְׁלָמִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֥י הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: So they brought the ark of God, and set it in the midst of the tent that David had pitched for it: and they offered burnt sacrifices and peace offerings before God.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cumque complesset David offerens holocausta et pacifica, benedixit populo in nomine Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְכַ֣ל דָּוִ֔יד מֵהַעֲל֥וֹת הָעֹלָ֖ה וְהַשְּׁלָמִ֑ים וַיְבָ֥רֶךְ אֶת־הָעָ֖ם בְּשֵׁ֥ם יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And when David had made an end of offering the burnt offerings and the peace offerings, he blessed the people in the name of the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et divisit universis per singulos, a viro usque ad mulierem, tortam panis, et partem assæ carnis bubalæ, et frixam oleo similam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְחַלֵּק֙ לְכׇל־אִ֣ישׁ יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מֵאִ֖ישׁ וְעַד־אִשָּׁ֑ה לְאִישׁ֙ כִּכַּר־לֶ֔חֶם וְאֶשְׁפָּ֖ר וַאֲשִׁישָֽׁה׃
verses.king_james: And he dealt to every one of Israel, both man and woman, to every one a loaf of bread, and a good piece of flesh, and a flagon of wine.

verses.latin_vulgate: Constituitque coram arca Domini de Levitis, qui ministrarent, et recordarentur operum ejus, et glorificarent atque laudarent Dominum Deum Israël :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּתֵּ֞ן לִפְנֵ֨י אֲר֧וֹן יְהֹוָ֛ה מִן־הַלְוִיִּ֖ם מְשָֽׁרְתִ֑ים וּלְהַזְכִּיר֙ וּלְהוֹד֣וֹת וּלְהַלֵּ֔ל לַיהֹוָ֖ה אֱלֹהֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And he appointed certain of the Levites to minister before the ark of the Lord, and to record, and to thank and praise the Lord God of Israel:

verses.latin_vulgate: Asaph principem, et secundum ejus Zachariam : porro Jahiel, et Semiramoth, et Jehiel, et Mathathiam, et Eliab, et Banaiam, et Obededom : Jehiel super organa psalterii et lyras : Asaph autem ut cymbalis personaret :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָסָ֥ף הָרֹ֖אשׁ וּמִשְׁנֵ֣הוּ זְכַרְיָ֑ה יְעִיאֵ֡ל וּשְׁמִירָמ֡וֹת וִיחִיאֵ֡ל וּמַתִּתְיָ֡ה וֶאֱלִיאָ֡ב וּבְנָיָ֩הוּ֩ וְעֹבֵ֨ד אֱדֹ֜ם וִיעִיאֵ֗ל בִּכְלֵ֤י נְבָלִים֙ וּבְכִנֹּר֔וֹת וְאָסָ֖ף בַּֽמְצִלְתַּ֥יִם מַשְׁמִֽיעַ׃
verses.king_james: Asaph the chief, and next to him Zechariah, Jeiel, and Shemiramoth, and Jehiel, and Mattithiah, and Eliab, and Benaiah, and Obed–edom: and Jeiel with psalteries and with harps; but Asaph made a sound with cymbals;

verses.latin_vulgate: Banaiam vero et Jaziel sacerdotes canere tuba jugiter coram arca fœderis Domini.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּבְנָיָ֥הוּ וְיַחֲזִיאֵ֖ל הַכֹּהֲנִ֑ים בַּחֲצֹצְר֣וֹת תָּמִ֔יד לִפְנֵ֖י אֲר֥וֹן בְּרִית־הָאֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: Benaiah also and Jahaziel the priests with trumpets continually before the ark of the covenant of God.

verses.latin_vulgate: In illo die fecit David principem ad confitendum Domino Asaph et fratres ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בַּיּ֣וֹם הַה֗וּא אָ֣ז נָתַ֤ן דָּוִיד֙ בָּרֹ֔אשׁ לְהֹד֖וֹת לַיהֹוָ֑ה בְּיַד־אָסָ֖ף וְאֶחָֽיו׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Then on that day David delivered first this psalm to thank the Lord into the hand of Asaph and his brethren.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Domino, et invocate nomen ejus :  notas facite in populis adinventiones ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֤וּ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ קִרְא֣וּ בִשְׁמ֔וֹ הוֹדִ֥יעוּ בָעַמִּ֖ים עֲלִילֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Give thanks unto the Lord, call upon his name, make known his deeds among the people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate ei, et psallite ei,  et narrate omnia mirabilia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֤ירוּ לוֹ֙ זַמְּרוּ־ל֔וֹ שִׂ֖יחוּ בְּכׇל־נִפְלְאֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Sing unto him, sing psalms unto him, talk ye of all his wondrous works.

verses.latin_vulgate: Laudate nomen sanctum ejus :  lætetur cor quærentium Dominum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הִֽתְהַלְלוּ֙ בְּשֵׁ֣ם קׇדְשׁ֔וֹ יִשְׂמַ֕ח לֵ֖ב מְבַקְשֵׁ֥י יְהֹוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: Glory ye in his holy name: let the heart of them rejoice that seek the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quærite Dominum, et virtutem ejus :  quærite faciem ejus semper.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דִּרְשׁ֤וּ יְהֹוָה֙ וְעֻזּ֔וֹ בַּקְּשׁ֥וּ פָנָ֖יו תָּמִֽיד׃
verses.king_james: Seek the Lord and his strength, seek his face continually.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recordamini mirabilium ejus quæ fecit ;  signorum illius, et judiciorum oris ejus,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִכְר֗וּ נִפְלְאֹתָיו֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר עָשָׂ֔ה מֹפְתָ֖יו וּמִשְׁפְּטֵי־פִֽיהוּ׃
verses.king_james: Remember his marvellous works that he hath done, his wonders, and the judgments of his mouth;

verses.latin_vulgate: semen Israël servi ejus,  filii Jacob electi ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זֶ֚רַע יִשְׂרָאֵ֣ל עַבְדּ֔וֹ בְּנֵ֥י יַעֲקֹ֖ב בְּחִירָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: O ye seed of Israel his servant, ye children of Jacob, his chosen ones.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ipse Dominus Deus noster :  in universa terra judicia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֚וּא יְהֹוָ֣ה אֱלֹהֵ֔ינוּ בְּכׇל־הָאָ֖רֶץ מִשְׁפָּטָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: He is the Lord our God; his judgments are in all the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Recordamini in sempiternum pacti ejus :  sermonis quem præcepit in mille generationes,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: זִכְר֤וּ לְעוֹלָם֙ בְּרִית֔וֹ דָּבָ֥ר צִוָּ֖ה לְאֶ֥לֶף דּֽוֹר׃
verses.king_james: Be ye mindful always of his covenant; the word which he commanded to a thousand generations;

verses.latin_vulgate: quem pepigit cum Abraham,  et juramenti illius cum Isaac.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֲשֶׁ֤ר כָּרַת֙ אֶת־אַבְרָהָ֔ם וּשְׁבוּעָת֖וֹ לְיִצְחָֽק׃
verses.king_james: Even of the covenant which he made with Abraham, and of his oath unto Isaac;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et constituit illud Jacob in præceptum,  et Israël in pactum sempiternum,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲמִידֶ֤הָ לְיַֽעֲקֹב֙ לְחֹ֔ק לְיִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל בְּרִ֥ית עוֹלָֽם׃
verses.king_james: And hath confirmed the same to Jacob for a law, and to Israel for an everlasting covenant,

verses.latin_vulgate: dicens : Tibi dabo terram Chanaan,  funiculum hæreditatis vestræ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֵאמֹ֗ר לְךָ֙ אֶתֵּ֣ן אֶֽרֶץ־כְּנָ֔עַן חֶ֖בֶל נַחֲלַתְכֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: Saying, Unto thee will I give the land of Canaan, the lot of your inheritance;

verses.latin_vulgate: cum essent pauci numero,  parvi et coloni ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בִּהְיֽוֹתְכֶם֙ מְתֵ֣י מִסְפָּ֔ר כִּמְעַ֖ט וְגָרִ֥ים בָּֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: When ye were but few, even a few, and strangers in it.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et transierunt de gente in gentem,  et de regno ad populum alterum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּֽתְהַלְּכוּ֙ מִגּ֣וֹי אֶל־גּ֔וֹי וּמִמַּמְלָכָ֖ה אֶל־עַ֥ם אַחֵֽר׃
verses.king_james: And when they went from nation to nation, and from one kingdom to another people;

verses.latin_vulgate: Non dimisit quemquam calumniari eos,  sed increpavit pro eis reges.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לֹֽא־הִנִּ֤יחַ לְאִישׁ֙ לְעׇשְׁקָ֔ם וַיּ֥וֹכַח עֲלֵיהֶ֖ם מְלָכִֽים׃
verses.king_james: He suffered no man to do them wrong: yea, he reproved kings for their sakes,

verses.latin_vulgate: Nolite tangere christos meos,  et in prophetis meis nolite malignari.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אַֽל־תִּגְּעוּ֙ בִּמְשִׁיחָ֔י וּבִנְבִיאַ֖י אַל־תָּרֵֽעוּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Saying, Touch not mine anointed, and do my prophets no harm.

verses.latin_vulgate: Cantate Domino omnis terra ;  annuntiate ex die in diem salutare ejus :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: שִׁ֤ירוּ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ כׇּל־הָאָ֔רֶץ בַּשְּׂר֥וּ מִיּֽוֹם־אֶל־י֖וֹם יְשׁוּעָתֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Sing unto the Lord, all the earth; shew forth from day to day his salvation.

verses.latin_vulgate: narrate in gentibus gloriam ejus ;  in cunctis populis mirabilia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: סַפְּר֤וּ בַגּוֹיִם֙ אֶת־כְּבוֹד֔וֹ בְּכׇל־הָעַמִּ֖ים נִפְלְאֹתָֽיו׃
verses.king_james: Declare his glory among the heathen; his marvellous works among all nations.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quia magnus Dominus, et laudabilis nimis,  et horribilis super omnes deos.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּי֩ גָד֨וֹל יְהֹוָ֤ה וּמְהֻלָּל֙ מְאֹ֔ד וְנוֹרָ֥א ה֖וּא עַל־כׇּל־אֱלֹהִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For great is the Lord, and greatly to be praised: he also is to be feared above all gods.

verses.latin_vulgate: Omnes enim dii populorum idola :  Dominus autem cælos fecit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֠י כׇּל־אֱלֹהֵ֤י הָֽעַמִּים֙ אֱלִילִ֔ים וַיהֹוָ֖ה שָׁמַ֥יִם עָשָֽׂה׃
verses.king_james: For all the gods of the people are idols: but the Lord made the heavens.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confessio et magnificentia coram eo :  fortitudo et gaudium in loco ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: ה֤וֹד וְהָדָר֙ לְפָנָ֔יו עֹ֥ז וְחֶדְוָ֖ה בִּמְקֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Glory and honour are in his presence; strength and gladness are in his place.

verses.latin_vulgate: Afferte Domino, familiæ populorum :  afferte Domino gloriam et imperium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָב֤וּ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ מִשְׁפְּח֣וֹת עַמִּ֔ים הָב֥וּ לַיהֹוָ֖ה כָּב֥וֹד וָעֹֽז׃
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord, ye kindreds of the people, give unto the Lord glory and strength.

verses.latin_vulgate: Date Domino gloriam ;  nomini ejus levate sacrificium,  et venite in conspectu ejus :  et adorate Dominum in decore sancto.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הָב֥וּ לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה כְּב֣וֹד שְׁמ֑וֹ שְׂא֤וּ מִנְחָה֙ וּבֹ֣אוּ לְפָנָ֔יו הִשְׁתַּחֲו֥וּ לַֽיהֹוָ֖ה בְּהַדְרַת־קֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: Give unto the Lord the glory due unto his name: bring an offering, and come before him: worship the Lord in the beauty of holiness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Commoveatur a facie ejus omnis terra :  ipse enim fundavit orbem immobilem.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: חִ֤ילוּ מִלְּפָנָיו֙ כׇּל־הָאָ֔רֶץ אַף־תִּכּ֥וֹן תֵּבֵ֖ל בַּל־תִּמּֽוֹט׃
verses.king_james: Fear before him, all the earth: the world also shall be stable, that it be not moved.

verses.latin_vulgate: Lætentur cæli, et exultet terra,  et dicant in nationibus : Dominus regnavit.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִשְׂמְח֤וּ הַשָּׁמַ֙יִם֙ וְתָגֵ֣ל הָאָ֔רֶץ וְיֹאמְר֥וּ בַגּוֹיִ֖ם יְהֹוָ֥ה מָלָֽךְ׃
verses.king_james: Let the heavens be glad, and let the earth rejoice: and let men say among the nations, The Lord reigneth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tonet mare et plenitudo ejus ;  exultent agri, et omnia quæ in eis sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: יִרְעַ֤ם הַיָּם֙ וּמְלוֹא֔וֹ יַעֲלֹ֥ץ הַשָּׂדֶ֖ה וְכׇל־אֲשֶׁר־בּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: Let the sea roar, and the fulness thereof: let the fields rejoice, and all that is therein.

verses.latin_vulgate: Tunc laudabunt ligna saltus coram Domino :  quia venit judicare terram.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אָ֥ז יְרַנְּנ֖וּ עֲצֵ֣י הַיָּ֑עַר מִלִּפְנֵ֣י יְהֹוָ֔ה כִּי־בָ֖א לִשְׁפּ֥וֹט אֶת־הָאָֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: Then shall the trees of the wood sing out at the presence of the Lord, because he cometh to judge the earth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Confitemini Domino, quoniam bonus :  quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: הוֹד֤וּ לַֽיהֹוָה֙ כִּ֣י ט֔וֹב כִּ֥י לְעוֹלָ֖ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: O give thanks unto the Lord; for he is good; for his mercy endureth for ever.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et dicite : Salva nos, Deus salvator noster,  et congrega nos, et erue de gentibus :  ut confiteamur nomini sancto tuo,  et exultemus in carminibus tuis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִמְר֕וּ הוֹשִׁיעֵ֙נוּ֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׁעֵ֔נוּ וְקַבְּצֵ֥נוּ וְהַצִּילֵ֖נוּ מִן־הַגּוֹיִ֑ם לְהֹדוֹת֙ לְשֵׁ֣ם קׇדְשֶׁ֔ךָ לְהִשְׁתַּבֵּ֖חַ בִּתְהִלָּתֶֽךָ׃
verses.king_james: And say ye, Save us, O God of our salvation, and gather us together, and deliver us from the heathen, that we may give thanks to thy holy name, and glory in thy praise.

verses.latin_vulgate: Benedictus Dominus Deus Israël,  ab æterno usque in æternum. Et dicat omnis populo : Amen, et hymnum Domino.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: בָּר֤וּךְ יְהֹוָה֙ אֱלֹהֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל מִן־הָעוֹלָ֖ם וְעַ֣ד הָעֹלָ֑ם וַיֹּאמְר֤וּ כׇל־הָעָם֙ אָמֵ֔ן וְהַלֵּ֖ל לַיהֹוָֽה׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Blessed be the Lord God of Israel for ever and ever. And all the people said, Amen, and praised the Lord.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reliquit itaque ibi coram arca fœderis Domini Asaph et fratres ejus, ut ministrarent in conspectu arcæ jugiter per singulos dies, et vices suas.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּעֲזׇב־שָׁ֗ם לִפְנֵי֙ אֲר֣וֹן בְּרִית־יְהֹוָ֔ה לְאָסָ֖ף וּלְאֶחָ֑יו לְשָׁרֵ֞ת לִפְנֵ֧י הָאָר֛וֹן תָּמִ֖יד לִדְבַר־י֥וֹם בְּיוֹמֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: So he left there before the ark of the covenant of the Lord Asaph and his brethren, to minister before the ark continually, as every day’s work required:

verses.latin_vulgate: Porro Obededom, et fratres ejus sexaginta octo : et Obededom filium Idithun, et Hosa, constituit janitores ;
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעֹבֵ֥ד אֱדֹ֛ם וַאֲחֵיהֶ֖ם שִׁשִּׁ֣ים וּשְׁמוֹנָ֑ה {ס} וְעֹבֵ֨ד אֱדֹ֧ם בֶּן־יְדִית֛וּן וְחֹסָ֖ה לְשֹׁעֲרִֽים׃
verses.king_james: And Obed–edom with their brethren, threescore and eight; Obed–edom also the son of Jeduthun and Hosah to be porters:

verses.latin_vulgate: Sadoc autem sacerdotem, et fratres ejus sacerdotes, coram tabernaculo Domini in excelso quod erat in Gabaon,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאֵ֣ת ׀ צָד֣וֹק הַכֹּהֵ֗ן וְאֶחָיו֙ הַכֹּ֣הֲנִ֔ים לִפְנֵ֖י מִשְׁכַּ֣ן יְהֹוָ֑ה בַּבָּמָ֖ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר בְּגִבְעֽוֹן׃
verses.king_james: And Zadok the priest, and his brethren the priests, before the tabernacle of the Lord in the high place that was at Gibeon,

verses.latin_vulgate: ut offerrent holocausta Domino super altare holocautomatis jugiter, mane et vespere, juxta omnia quæ scripta sunt in lege Domini, quam præcepit Israëli.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: לְֽהַעֲלוֹת֩ עֹל֨וֹת לַיהֹוָ֜ה עַל־מִזְבַּ֧ח הָעֹלָ֛ה תָּמִ֖יד לַבֹּ֣קֶר וְלָעָ֑רֶב וּלְכׇל־הַכָּתוּב֙ בְּתוֹרַ֣ת יְהֹוָ֔ה אֲשֶׁ֥ר צִוָּ֖ה עַל־יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: To offer burnt offerings unto the Lord upon the altar of the burnt offering continually morning and evening, and to do according to all that is written in the law of the Lord, which he commanded Israel;

verses.latin_vulgate: Et post eum Heman, et Idithun, et reliquos electos, unumquemque vocabulo suo ad confitendum Domino, quoniam in æternum misericordia ejus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעִמָּהֶם֙ הֵימָ֣ן וִידוּת֔וּן וּשְׁאָר֙ הַבְּרוּרִ֔ים אֲשֶׁ֥ר נִקְּב֖וּ בְּשֵׁמ֑וֹת לְהֹדוֹת֙ לַֽיהֹוָ֔ה כִּ֥י לְעוֹלָ֖ם חַסְדּֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And with them Heman and Jeduthun, and the rest that were chosen, who were expressed by name, to give thanks to the Lord, because his mercy endureth for ever;

verses.latin_vulgate: Heman quoque et Idithun canentes tuba, et quatientes cymbala et omnia musicorum organa ad canendum Deo : filios autem Idithun fecit esse portarios.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְעִמָּהֶם֩ הֵימָ֨ן וִידוּת֜וּן חֲצֹצְר֤וֹת וּמְצִלְתַּ֙יִם֙ לְמַשְׁמִיעִ֔ים וּכְלֵ֖י שִׁ֣יר הָאֱלֹהִ֑ים וּבְנֵ֥י יְדוּת֖וּן לַשָּֽׁעַר׃
verses.king_james: And with them Heman and Jeduthun with trumpets and cymbals for those that should make a sound, and with musical instruments of God. And the sons of Jeduthun were porters.

verses.latin_vulgate: Reversusque est omnis populus in domum suam : et David, ut benediceret etiam domui suæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיֵּלְכ֥וּ כׇל־הָעָ֖ם אִ֣ישׁ לְבֵית֑וֹ וַיִּסֹּ֥ב דָּוִ֖יד לְבָרֵ֥ךְ אֶת־בֵּיתֽוֹ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: And all the people departed every man to his house: and David returned to bless his house.
